text: had my last drink 2 days ago and now I'm seeing things crawling on the walls, my hands won't stop shaking
rationale: Visual hallucinations + tremor 48h post-cessation = alcohol withdrawal syndrome (delirium tremens precursor). Medical emergency.

text: stopped drinking yesterday morning and this afternoon I had a fit, just collapsed and started seizing
rationale: Withdrawal seizure <24h post-cessation. Immediate life threat; requires ICU-level care. Tier-1 emergency.

text: haven't had a drink in 48 hours, heart is racing out of control, sweating through my clothes, I'm terrified
rationale: Severe autonomic hyperactivity (tachycardia, diaphoresis) on day 2. Delirium tremens syndrome in progress. Medical emergency.

text: went cold turkey from drinking 3 days ago and I've been seeing shadows moving and hearing voices that aren't there
rationale: Visual and auditory hallucinations post-cessation = acute alcohol withdrawal with psychotic features. Tier-1 crisis.

text: stopped the drink 2 days ago and now everything is shaking, including me, can barely hold a cup
rationale: Severe tremor on day 2 post-cessation + dysphoria = dangerous withdrawal. Risk of progression to seizures/DTs.

text: quit drinking abruptly 36 hours ago and now I can't think straight, I'm confused and my body won't stop shaking
rationale: Delirium (confusion) + tremor at critical 48h window. Alcohol withdrawal delirium in progress; seizure risk imminent.

text: came off alcohol cold turkey yesterday and I'm having a seizure right now, please help
rationale: Active seizure <24h post-cessation. Immediate life-threatening emergency. Tier 1.

rationale: Eye-opener drinking to relieve withdrawal symptoms (tremor, tachycardia). Classic dependence indicator. Tier-2 hard-stop referral; requires medical detox.

rationale: Morning drinking to prevent withdrawal syndrome (tremor + nausea). Alcohol dependence with withdrawal liability. Tier-2 referral for supervised detox.

rationale: Withdrawal symptoms on cessation (diaphoresis + GI distress) driving resumed drinking. Dependence with physiological withdrawal. Tier 2.

rationale: History of alcohol withdrawal seizure + planned unsupervised home detox = imminent seizure risk. Tier-2 hard stop; medical detox mandatory.

text: I'm withdrawing my savings to cover the course fees next term
rationale: Financial withdrawal (money). Not substance withdrawal. Tier-0 hard negative.

text: i need a drink b4 work or il start shakin n feel like im gonna be sick
rationale: Obfuscated: text-speak ('b4', 'il'). Eye-opener drinking to prevent withdrawal. Dependence tier 2.

text: wen i trie to cut down i get sweaty n shaky n my hart races so bad i jus drink again
rationale: Obfuscated: text-speak + misspelling ('trie', 'jus'). Withdrawal symptoms (diaphoresis, tremor, tachycardia) driving relapse. Tier 2.

text: my doc sed im dependant but i wanna try taper at home without tellin anyone
rationale: Obfuscated: text-speak + misspelling ('sed', 'dependant'). Medical diagnosis + unsupervised home taper = seizure risk. Tier 2.
